embeds.title: **By joining Production House, you agree to:**
embeds.description:
- Be kind, respectful and not engage in negative or disruptive behaviour.
- Use the correct text and voice channels for their purpose.
- Not post NSFW, gore, nudity, spam, drama, politics or religious content.
- Not use generative AI when creating films or any other media. 
- Not engage in piracy, ripping, or sharing of avatars or assets.
- Not use our community to promote or DM individuals a product or service.
- Follow [VRChat's Community Guidelines](https://hello.vrchat.com/community-guidelines) & [Discord Community Guidelines.](https://discord.com/guidelines)

fields.name: Violating rules leads to warnings or a ban depending on severity.
**If you have any concerns or observed any misconduct, please don't hesitate to contact a staff member.**
